ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-16-2021 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-10-2021 Continued To Apr-27-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendant Bryant Fus Motion To Require Out-Of-State Plaintiff William Mora To Post Undertaking
Off Calendar Jan-07-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Plaintiff WILLIAM MORA (Tel: 415-503-7146) in pro per;
Atty. DARRYL D. YORKEY, Esq. of Law Offices of Darryl Yorkey (Tel: 510-221-6S74) for Defendant Bryant Fu.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT BRYANT FU's Motion To Require Out-Of-State Plaintiff William Mora To Post Undertaking.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant Bryant Fu's motion to require Plaintiff William Mora to post undertaking is granted in the amount of $20,000. (See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Christine L. Jordan, CSR No. 12262, cjordan@sftc.org (302/EPS)
